name: Type Generator
author: FlutWiz
description: Generate typed models from API responses using quicktype.
features: Captures HTTP response JSON automatically after each request
Generates TypeScript, Dart, Go, Kotlin, Swift, Java, and Zod types
Live preview with copy to clipboard
Per-language options (null safety, readonly, JSON tags, etc.)
Remembers last used language and class name

ui.description: Registers a sidebar tab for generating types

readme:
# Voiden Type Generator

Generate typed model code from your API responses without leaving Voiden.

## Usage

1. Run any HTTP request that returns JSON
2. Open the **Types** tab in the right sidebar
3. Select your target language and class name
4. Click the **Copy** icon to copy the generated code

## Supported Languages

TypeScript · Dart · Go · Kotlin · Swift · Java

---

Powered by [quicktype](https://github.com/quicktype/quicktype).
